ideation: This animation sequence depicts a robot delicately spreading butter, highlighting the smoothness and care involved.  The robot uses both arms to accomplish this task. Frame 1 shows both arms extended forward, palms facing downward. Frame 2 shows the right arm dipping slightly downward as if holding the butter container.  Frame 3 shows both arms moving in a coordinated motion; the right arm is still holding the butter, but the left arm is now slightly raised with the palm facing down and slightly forward, as if spreading the butter.  Frame 4 shows the left arm moving the butter across an imaginary surface. Frame 5 shows both arms returning to a relaxed position at the sides.

frames.beat: arms extend forward, ready to spread
right arm dips slightly, holding the butter
left arm begins to spread, right arm guides
left arm sweeps across, smoothing the butter
both arms return to rest, task complete
